title: sonchus bulbosus subsp. bulbosus
intro: Sonchus bulbosus subsp. bulbosus, also known as Sonchus bulbosus, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its edible leaves and taproot. The medicinal properties of Sonchus bulbosus subsp. bulbosus include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of using this plant include its possible applications in treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sonchus bulbosus subsp. bulbosus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
